revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{#if:{{{list|}}} |[[File:wikisource-logo.svg|{{#if:{{{small|}}}|12px|20px}}|class=noviewer|Wikisource logo]] Works by or about {{#if:{{{wslink|{{{1|}}}}}}|<!-- use override/local values-->[[:s:Author:{{{wslink|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2|{{{wslink|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]|<!-- use wikidata values-->[[:s:{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getSiteLink|enwikisource}}|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|pageId}}}}]]}} on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]: {{{list}}} |[[File:wikisource-logo.svg|{{#if:{{{small}}}|12px|20px}}|class=noviewer|Wikisource logo]] Works by or about {{#if:{{{wslink|{{{1|}}}}}}|<!-- use override/local values-->[[:s:Author:{{{wslink|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2|{{{wslink|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]|<!-- use wikidata values-->[[:s:{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getSiteLink|enwikisource}}|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|pageId}}}}]]}} at [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] }}<includeonly>{{namespace detect|main={{#if:{{#invoke:WikidataIB|pageId}}||[[Category:Wikisource templates with missing id]]}}{{#if:{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getSiteLink|enwikisource}}||[[Category:Wikisource templates with missing id]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{list|}}} |[[File:wikisource-logo.svg|{{#if:{{{small|}}}|12px|20px}}|class=noviewer|Wikisource logo]] Works by or about {{#if:{{{wslink|{{{1|}}}}}}|<!-- use override/local values-->[[:s:Author:{{{wslink|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2|{{{wslink|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]|<!-- use wikidata values-->[[:s:{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getSiteLink|enwikisource}}|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|pageId}}}}]]}} on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]: {{{list}}} |[[File:wikisource-logo.svg|{{#if:{{{small}}}|12px|20px}}|class=noviewer|Wikisource logo]] Works by or about {{#if:{{{wslink|{{{1|}}}}}}|<!-- use override/local values-->[[:s:Author:{{{wslink|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2|{{{wslink|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]|<!-- use wikidata values-->[[:s:{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getSiteLink|enwikisource}}|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|pageId}}}}]]}} at [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] }}<includeonly>{{namespace detect|main={{#if:{{#invoke:WikidataIB|pageId}}||}}{{#if:{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getSiteLink|enwikisource}}||}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikisource templates with missing id]] [[Category:Wikisource templates with missing id]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{list|}}} |[[File:wikisource-logo.svg|{{#if:{{{small|}}}|12px|20px}}|class=noviewer|Wikisource logo]] Works by or about {{#if:{{{wslink|{{{1|}}}}}}|[[:s:Author:{{{wslink|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2|{{{wslink|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]|[[:s:{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getSiteLink|enwikisource}}|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|pageId}}}}]]}} on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]: {{{list}}} |[[File:wikisource-logo.svg|{{#if:{{{small}}}|12px|20px}}|class=noviewer|Wikisource logo]] Works by or about {{#if:{{{wslink|{{{1|}}}}}}|[[:s:Author:{{{wslink|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2|{{{wslink|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]|[[:s:{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getSiteLink|enwikisource}}|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getLabel|{{#invoke:WikidataIB|pageId}}}}]]}} at [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] }}<includeonly>{{namespace detect|main={{#if:{{#invoke:WikidataIB|pageId}}||}}{{#if:{{#invoke:WikidataIB|getSiteLink|enwikisource}}||}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Wikisource templates with missing id]] [[Category:Wikisource templates with missing id]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
